specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5-6600K / AMD FX-6300 (or any 4-core, ~3.5GHz CPU)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 (or 750 Ti) / AMD Radeon HD 7770 (or R7 260X) – 1–2 GB VRAM
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Direct X Compatible
  • VR Support: Optimised for VR via Virtual Desktop - Kemet X is not optimised for SteamVR. To play in VR, please use a big screen via Virtual Desktop, which supports Meta Quest 2, Quest 3, Quest Pro, and Pico headsets. Additionally, a gamepad or keyboard is required for input, as VR motion controllers are not supported.
  • Additional Notes: Integrated graphics (Intel HD, Iris) might run the game at lower settings/resolution but are not recommended for a smooth experience. If playing with a gamepad, you may occasionally need to visit websites. In such cases, you will revert to using a keyboard and mouse.
